semantic.role: Barrel export module providing a stable public facade for the Manifest entity.
responsibilities: Re-export the 'Manifest' symbol from the manifest facade submodule to provide a single import point.
Abstract internal module structure so callers depend only on this stable entry point.
outOfScope: Any business logic or data manipulation related to manifests.
invariants: The module must only re-export symbols from the designated facade path; it must not define new exports.
External consumers should import Manifest from this module rather than from deeper internal paths.
The re-exported symbol must remain compatible with the contract defined in the manifest facade.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a stable, minimal public API surface for the Manifest domain to decouple callers from internal module structure.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Initial commit establishing the module as a facade barrel export.

publicSurface.description: Re-exported symbol representing the Manifest entity. External modules should import Manifest from this module to obtain the public interface for working with manifests.

English.role: Barrel export module that acts as a stable public facade for the Manifest entity.
responsibilities: Re-export Manifest from the manifest facade submodule to provide a single import point.
Abstract internal module structure so callers depend only on this stable entry point.
outOfScope: Any business logic or data manipulation related to manifests.
